prompts.text: "Edge pieces" have a flat side — they go around the outside. "Corner pieces" have two flat sides.
Before placing, ask: "Where do you think that piece goes? What clues can you see — colours, shapes?"
Look at piece shapes together: "This piece has a bump — we need a hole the same shape to fit it in."
Ask: "What's the finished picture going to show? Can you guess from what's already there?"
